activated_after: The exact-only synthesis/composition attempt stopped before healing: head 7.11's coarse individually exact program reduced circuit-only accuracy to 919/1280, while head 9.0's best coarse program achieved 1279/1280 full and 1280/1280 circuit-only.

candidate_search.referee: minimum of full and selected-circuit accuracy against P(x) on D
candidate_search.scoped_scan: one restricted key_token membership rule over the frozen manifest's opener_context_token_id values
candidate_search.lm_proposer: not configured on the offline GPU host; no unrecorded external proposal is used

composition_gate_before_healing: every retained attention head is replaced and both full and circuit-only accuracy are at least 0.98 on D
preservation: The exact-only attempt remains unchanged under artifacts/gpt2-programs-bounded-quote. This fallback writes to artifacts/gpt2-programs-bounded-quote-scan-fallback.
